storyboard.title: Save One Profile Once
storyboard.user_question_answered: What does this extension do in one sentence?
storyboard.overlay_headline: Save one local profile for repeat form work.
storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Keep one reliable set of contact details ready in the popup.
storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Real popup UI only. Do not show unsupported sync or team features.

storyboard.title: Fill The Active Page
storyboard.user_question_answered: How fast is the core action?
storyboard.overlay_headline: Fill the active form in one click.
storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Use the extension action only when you are ready to fill visible fields.
storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Show a real form page and keep the claim to visible supported fields.

storyboard.title: See The Filled Result
storyboard.user_question_answered: What result should I expect after using it?
storyboard.overlay_headline: Get a clean filled result without retyping.
storyboard.overlay_subcopy: The happy path should show real field coverage, not a mock result.
storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Must stay tied to the actual browser-smoke scenario.

storyboard.title: Low-Permission Workflow
storyboard.user_question_answered: Why should I trust the permission footprint?
storyboard.overlay_headline: Minimal permissions. No broad host access.
storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Storage, activeTab, and scripting only for the current supported wedge.
storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Do not imply more automation than the current permission set allows.

storyboard.title: Trust And Privacy
storyboard.user_question_answered: Why is this safer than a broader workflow tool?
storyboard.overlay_headline: Local-only profile storage. No account required.
storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Privacy language must stay literal and provable in the bundle.
storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Only use claims that match the real storage and network behavior.
